Job application form
An A320 operator base in Asia would like to invite suitable candidates for the position of A320 First Officer. This is an excellent opportunity to clock up to 200, 500 or 800 hours on the A320.

Currently you can chose to do either : -

1) 200 hours line training on the A320

1) 500 hours line training on the A320

1) 800 hours line training on the A320

Employment Benefits : -

Uniform will be provided
Hotel and transport provided during nightstop at both domestic and overseas destination

Requirements  : -

• Hold a Commercial Pilot License with Instrument Rating
• Minimum flying hours of 200 hours
• Rated on the Airbus 320 ( must be current )
• Minimum of Level 4 of Aviation English.
• Good command of English, both written and spoken.
• Must be physically and mentally fit.
• Company prefers FAA, JAA, CASA and EASA licence holder
• Hold a certificate of satisfactory completion of multi-crew co-operation (MCC) & Jet Transition Course
• Must Have Frozen ATPL
• All nationality are welcome

Training :

• Company will provide you with base/endorsement flight training
• Company will provide line training
• We can assist you in getting an A320 Type Rating, MCC , Jet Transition Course and Frozen ATPL

Assessment :

The assessment will consist of an interview and simulator check and will be either in Bangkok,
Hong Kong or Singapore.
